---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="about-section">
  <div class="about-text">
    <h1 class="about-name">Eli Cheam Shapiro</h1>
    <p class="about-title">Incoming Analyst, Penn Wharton Budget Model</p>
    <p class="about-subtitle">MRes in Economics · Sciences Po Paris</p>

    <p class="about-bio">
      In June, I will be joining the
      <a href="https://budgetmodel.wharton.upenn.edu/" target="_blank">Penn Wharton Budget Model</a>
      as an analyst. My research interests are fiscal policy, public investment, and inequality.
    </p>

    <p class="about-bio">
      Previously, I was a Predoctoral Research Assistant at Trinity College Dublin.
      I hold an MRes in Economics from Sciences Po Paris
      and a BA in Economics from Bard College.
    </p>

    <p class="about-bio">
      I am proficient in R, Python, STATA, and Julia.
    </p>

    <div class="about-links">
      <a href="mailto:elicheamshapiro@gmail.com" class="about-link">
        <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> elicheamshapiro@gmail.com
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/eli-cheam-shapiro" target="_blank" class="about-link">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
      </a>
      <a href="cv.qmd" class="about-link">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person-fill"></i> CV
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="about-photo">
    <img src="assets/photo.jpg" alt="Eli Cheam Shapiro" class="profile-photo"/>
  </div>
</div>
```
